violations.text: Bowl were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026
Fried banana chips observed being sold from an unapproved source. PIC informed and PIC voluntarily disposed of chips. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

Raw animal foods (beef) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (container of milk and bags of cooked meats) in the prep unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

( Various food product) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

(Tripe ) was observed thawing on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

(dry food product) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

The presence of (flies) is not controlled as evidenced by (live activity ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

(Various food product ) were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in cooler and kitchen). Dried prepackaged foods(bagged) were observed being stored in mop sink. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Rice cooker moved to counter top and food removed from mop sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

Utensils in the (kitchen ) are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the (front counter ) area. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

Wood is used in the construction of (prep table shelf ) in the (kitchen ) area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of debris: -prep units -prep table shelves -hot hold equipment shelves -shelves in walk in cooler -2 dr reach in -exterior of walk in cooler -food storage bins/containers New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

The floors and walls throughout the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

Various food product was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

Dry foods packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
Pots of broth were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in cooler). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of soup, etc. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves(under counter) and food storage shelves in the walk in cooler have an accumulation soil residue, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024
The condensate from the the walk in refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024
